title: astracantha schottiana
intro: Astracantha schottiana, also known as Astragalus schottianus, is a species of legume plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to enhance immune function and combat various health issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, providing health benefits such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and protecting against infections. Astracantha schottiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
